description: Fallback secret hardcoded, errors swallowed, and API key logged in error path. Multiple independently-exploitable issues in one payment client.

issues.summary: Hardcoded Stripe live secret as fallback for missing env var. Production key will leak into source control.
Stripe API key printed to console.log inside error branch. Key ends up in log aggregation and error trackers.
Network errors silently swallowed — caller receives {ok: false} with no distinction between declined card and dropped connection. Previous code propagated the error.
Return shape changed (ok/chargeId) but callers likely expected full Stripe charge object. Unreviewed contract break.
